seo_title: Business AI on WhatsApp for Small Businesses in India
meta_description: Meta introduces Business AI on WhatsApp for small businesses in India, enabling 24/7 customer support and transforming growth.
body_html:
Business AI on WhatsApp is now available for small businesses in India, enabling 24/7 customer support.

Easy IntegrationNo coding or complex software requiredSimple setup process within a few hours Business BenefitsIncreased conversion ratesImproved customer engagementEnhanced growth potential “We were losing leads that came in late at night, and now with 24/7 support, our conversion rate has skyrocketed to 80-90%.” - Tuba Siddiqui, Co-founder, Soil Concept Real-world resultsIncreased sales and growthImproved customer satisfaction Businesses can learn more about Business AI on WhatsApp and get started by visiting https://www.facebook.com/business/ai/business-ai/whatsapp.

source.title: Introducing Business AI on WhatsApp for Small Businesses in India
source.summary:
To enable small businesses with AI-powered customer support directly into the WhatsApp Business app, we've launched Business AI in India.

The post Introducing Business AI on WhatsApp for Small Businesses in India appeared first on Meta Newsroom.
